headline: Consumers Energy Expands Outreach Across Michigan, Helping Customers Manage and Pay Bills
summary: Consumers Energy continues to expand its direct outreach to Michigan customers, reaching over 30,000 people directly this year through phone calls and in-person events around the state.

raw.headline: Consumers Energy Expands Outreach Across Michigan, Helping Customers Manage and Pay Bills
raw.summary: Consumers Energy continues to expand its direct outreach to Michigan customers, reaching over 30,000 people directly this year through phone calls and in-person events around the state.

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on CMS Energy, Lowers Price Target to $82
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Jeremy Tonet   maintains CMS Energy (NYSE:CMS) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $86 to $82.

raw.headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on CMS Energy, Lowers Price Target to $82
raw.summary: JP Morgan  analyst Jeremy Tonet   maintains CMS Energy (NYSE:CMS) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $86 to $82.

headline: Entergy Strengthens Growth Through Nuclear and Grid Investments
summary: ETR leans on its nuclear portfolio and a $57 billion grid plan to drive demand and reliability, but regulatory risks and efficiency trends persist.

raw.headline: Entergy Strengthens Growth Through Nuclear and Grid Investments
